landing.subheadline: QudrahTech connects job seekers with AI-powered career assessments, ATS-optimized CVs, and smart job matching.
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by professionals across the region
landing.trustedNames: Hospitality Corp|Tech Solutions|Finance Group|HR Consulting|Global Retail|Healthcare Co.
landing.howTitle: Three steps to your dream career
landing.step1Desc: Create your CV with AI assistance. Get instant ATS score.
landing.step2Desc: Evaluate skills, communication, and behavioral traits.
landing.step3Desc: Match with employers and apply with one click.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to move faster
landing.featuresSubtitle: Purpose-built tools for job seekers and employers—designed for clarity, speed, and trust.
landing.feature1Desc: Measure skills and strengths with a modern assessment flow.
landing.feature2Desc: Build a clean CV and improve your ATS compatibility score.
landing.feature3Desc: Get tailored roles based on your profile and performance.
landing.feature4Desc: Keep assessments fair with lightweight monitoring.
landing.feature5Desc: Learn from mentors and practice interviews confidently.
landing.feature6Desc: Arabic, English, and more—with instant RTL support.
landing.trustTitleLine: The only platform where results are 100% verified
landing.trustSubtitle: Every assessment is monitored in real time. Employers see exactly what happened — no shortcuts, no cheating.
landing.trustPill1Desc: Candidate must share entire screen to proceed
landing.trustPill3Desc: Any tab change is flagged instantly
landing.trustPill4Desc: Typing patterns analyzed for AI assistance
landing.trustFlagsNote: Every flag is recorded and available for employer review
landing.trustSessionMeta: Session recorded · Screen shared · Camera on
landing.audiencesTitle: Built for both sides of hiring
landing.jobSeekersBullet1: Build an ATS-ready CV in minutes
landing.jobSeekersBullet2: Get an AI assessment score you can share
landing.jobSeekersBullet3: Discover roles that fit your strengths
landing.jobSeekersBullet4: Apply faster with a clean profile
landing.employersBullet2: Review applications with AI match insights
landing.pricingTitle: Simple pricing that scales with you
landing.faq1A: Yes—start on the Free plan, upgrade when you need more.
landing.faq2A: It measures skills, communication, and behavioral traits using structured tasks.
landing.faq3A: ATS is an Applicant Tracking System used to scan and filter CVs.
landing.faq4A: We use modern best practices to protect your data and access.
landing.faq5A: Only if you apply or explicitly share your results.
landing.faq6A: Arabic, English, French, Spanish, Urdu, and Turkish.

subscription.upgradeMessage: Pick Professional or Premium, then confirm — your plan updates right away while billing is in preview.
subscription.signupProfessionalBanner: You are signing up for the Professional plan!
subscription.signupPremiumBanner: You are signing up for the Premium plan!
subscription.signupFreeBanner: You are signing up on the Free plan — no payment required.
subscription.upgradeLoginRequired: Please log in to upgrade your plan.
subscription.upgradeNotice: Confirm Upgrade saves Professional or Premium to your account now at no charge (billing preview). You will land on your dashboard with ATS, AI tools, jobs, and applications ready.
subscription.upgradeKeepsTierUntilBilling: Developer note: leave PAYMENTS_LIVE unset (or false) so Confirm Upgrade persists tiers. When PAYMENTS_LIVE=true, use your payment provider to change tiers.
subscription.upgradeChooseRoleTitle: Who are you signing up as?
subscription.upgradeChooseRoleSubtitle: Pick Employer to post jobs (AI job descriptions, hiring tools) or Job seeker for CV & ATS, browsing jobs, and applications.
subscription.upgradeChooseEmployerHint: Dashboard: post jobs, candidates, AI descriptions
subscription.upgradeChooseJobSeekerHint: Dashboard: CV builder, browse jobs, applications
subscription.upgradeError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
subscription.testSwitcherSubtitle: For testing only: instantly switch your account tier and jump to CV Builder.
subscription.testSwitcherNote: This page is for testing and will be removed when payments are enabled.

cv.title: Build an ATS-ready CV
cv.premiumHint: For full features, use Premium plan

professionalIncludes.title: Included on Professional
professionalIncludes.item1: CV upload — AI reads your file and fills the builder
professionalIncludes.item2: ATS scan & AI ATS optimization when your score is low
professionalIncludes.item4: AI help for summary, experience bullets & suggested skills
professionalIncludes.item5: AI assessments, job matching ideas & training suggestions

upload.title: Upload existing CV
upload.subtitle: AI will read and fill everything automatically
upload.teaserSubtitle: AI upload & auto-fill is included with Professional and Premium. On Free you can build your CV step by step and export with one template.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Add skills that match your target role

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: Quick preview of your CV content

templates.title: Template
templates.subtitle: Choose a template for your PDF
templates.atsWarning: For applicant tracking systems (ATS), the Professional layout is usually safest. Modern and Creative look great but can parse less reliably than a simple, single-column layout.

premiumInline.atsRebuild: AI full CV rewrite for ATS — Professional

upgradeSheet.uploadBody: Upload a PDF or Word file and let AI extract your roles, dates, education, and skills into this builder. Saves time instead of typing everything manually. Requires Professional or Premium.
upgradeSheet.aiBody: Premium plans polish your summary, tighten experience bullets with stronger verbs, and suggest skills that fit your roles—while you keep editing every field yourself.
upgradeSheet.atsBody: Run a recruiter-style ATS check: scores, keyword gaps, and concrete tweaks so applicant tracking systems rank your CV higher. Unlock with Professional or Premium.
upgradeSheet.templatesBody: Free includes the Professional layout only. Unlock Modern and Creative designs for exported PDFs on Professional or Premium.
upgradeSheet.atsRebuildBody: When your scan is under 50%, Claude can rewrite your summary, roles, skills, and structure for stronger ATS alignment while keeping your contact details. Included on Professional and Premium after you run a scan.

ai.lockedHint: AI rewriting, skill suggestions, CV upload, ATS scoring, and extra templates are included with Professional or Premium. Tap Upgrade to see plans.

ats.title: ATS Analysis
ats.subtitle: See how recruiter systems may score your CV
ats.teaserSubtitle: Get an ATS-style score, keyword gaps, and fix tips. Available on Professional and Premium — upgrade to unlock.
ats.optimizeSubtitle: Your overall score is under {pct}%. We can generate an ATS-focused version of your CV (same PDF theme you selected). Run a new scan afterward to see the improvement.
ats.optimizeSuccess: Your CV content was updated for ATS. Scan again to refresh your score, then download PDF with your current template.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your CV. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Could not parse your CV. Please try again.
errors.uploadTimeout: Upload took too long. Try a smaller file or wait and try again.
errors.atsFailed: ATS scan failed. Please try again.
errors.aiFailed: AI request failed. Please try again.
errors.pdfFailed: PDF download failed. Please try again.
errors.atsRebuildFailed: Could not optimize your CV. Please try again.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Small steps compound—finish your profile, explore roles, and let AI spotlight the best fit for your future.
dashboard.talentPoolBannerTitle: You are in the talent pool
dashboard.talentPoolBannerBody: An employer or screening result placed you in the talent pool. You can still improve your profile and retake assessments when eligible.
dashboard.talentPoolReassessmentReady: Your 24-hour cooldown has ended — you can retake your assessment now.
dashboard.completeProfilePrompt: Your profile is {percent}% complete. Reach at least 80% for better AI matches.
dashboard.jobSeekerBannerSubtitle: Your profile is {percent}% complete—keep going for better matches.
dashboard.adminBannerSubtitle: Here is what is happening across the platform today.
dashboard.statFootnoteJobMatches: Fresh roles matched to your profile

dashboard.emptyUsersBody: Users will appear here as they join QudrahTech.
dashboard.emptyJobsBody: Job posts will appear here once employers publish roles.

dashboard.quickActionBrowseJobsDesc: Explore roles curated for your profile.

dashboard.statFootnoteBrowsePool: Active listings you can browse today

dashboard.atsCardSubtitle: Your CV currently scores {score}/100 on our ATS checklist.
dashboard.premiumHrHint: Book HR consultations from your success manager

dashboard.employerStarterPremiumBadge: You are on Premium — full employer suite.
dashboard.employerStarterAiBodyIncluded: Turn a short brief into a polished listing in step 2 when you post a job.
dashboard.employerStarterAiBodyLocked: Generate full job descriptions with AI on Professional or Premium.
dashboard.employerLoadingStatsSubtitle: Your plan and AI tools stay visible while we load your numbers.
dashboard.quickActionDesignAiInterviewDesc: Pick a job and set voice or multiple-choice questions for candidates.

jobs.applyNeedAssessment: Complete at least one AI assessment before you can apply.
jobs.applyTalentPoolBlocked: You are in the talent pool and cannot apply directly. Accept an employer invitation instead.

postWizard.aiJobDescLockedBody: Generate a full English + Arabic job description from the basics you entered in step 1. Upgrade to unlock.

profile.languagesHintProfile: One per line. Optional level: English — Fluent

employerCandidates.noCvOnFile: This candidate has not saved a CV in QudrahTech yet.
employerCandidates.downloadInterviewRecordingHint: Full-session audio is available when the candidate completes a recorded interview.
employerCandidates.contactHiddenHint: Contact hidden until offer accepted or hired
employerCandidates.declineReasonPlaceholder: Explain clearly — this is stored for compliance.
employerCandidates.contactLockedBanner: Direct contact details are hidden until the candidate accepts an offer or is marked hired. Use platform messaging.

assessment.title: AI General Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Five focused steps. Complete at your own pace — progress is saved after each step.
assessment.subtitleFree: Free for all plans. Proctored sessions. Pass mark: 50/100 overall.
assessment.stepTimeLimit: Step time limit: up to {min} minutes
assessment.fullReportFailed: Score below 50 — retake failed steps to improve.
assessment.nextStepHint: Continue with the next step from the assessment home.
assessment.scoreBreakdown: Scores: Skills, Communication, Behavioral, Industry fit
assessment.upgradeBody: Professional and Premium plans include AI assessments, interviews, and deeper insights.
assessment.ruleTab: Keep this tab active at all times.
assessment.ruleFace: Keep your face visible on camera.
assessment.ruleNoAi: Do not use AI tools or external help.
assessment.agreeRules: I agree to the assessment rules
assessment.dataConsentBody: I consent to QudrahTech recording and processing this assessment for scoring and, when I choose to share results, for employer review, in line with the privacy policy.

step1.title: General Knowledge & Intelligence
step1.desc: Logic, basic math, and patterns — no field knowledge required.

step2.title: Communication
step2.desc: Emails, clarity, and professional writing — universal scenarios.

step3.title: Behavioral
step3.desc: How you handle conflict, priorities, and teamwork at work.

step4.title: Professional Skills
step4.desc: Generic workplace judgment — not tied to any industry.

step5.title: Emotional Intelligence
step5.desc: Empathy, stress, and working with others — everyday situations.

general.title: General Career Assessment
general.desc: Broad strengths and career fit — recommended first.

industry.title: Industry-Specific Assessment
industry.desc: Scenarios aligned to your target sector.

proctoring.not_monitor: Warning: please share your entire screen (monitor).
proctoring.chancesLeft: {count} chance(s) remaining before your session is paused.
proctoring.suspendedBody: You have used all 3 proctoring warnings. Your session was stopped and you were moved to the talent pool. Please complete a reassessment after 24 hours.
proctoring.suspendedHome: Assessment is paused due to proctoring violations. Reassessment is available after 24 hours ({datetime}).
proctoring.flagged: Assessment has been flagged for review.

interview.title: AI Video Interview
interview.subtitle: Practice with AI voice questions and structured feedback.
interview.prepVoiceHint: Use a headset if you can. Your microphone uses noise suppression and echo cancellation. You can dictate your answer in the browser, refine the text, or use AI transcription from your mic.
interview.jobIdMissing: Open this interview from your applications list so we know which job it is for.
interview.noPendingJobInterview: You do not have a pending job interview. Apply for a job that requires an AI interview, then return here.
interview.speechNotSupported: Voice typing is not available in this browser — use AI transcribe or type your answer.
interview.answerPlaceholder: Speak using the buttons above, or type here.

job.title: Job-specific interview
job.desc: Tailored to a job you applied for (optional job ID).

common.slogan: Know Your Potential. Shape Your Future.

footer.slogan: Know Your Potential. Shape Your Future.

about.title: Built for clarity, built for outcomes
about.subtitle: QudrahTech helps job seekers and employers move faster—with trustworthy assessments, clean profiles, and better matching.
about.missionBody: Make hiring and job searching more human—by using AI to reduce noise, not replace judgment.
about.value1Body: Security, fairness, and transparency are non-negotiable.
about.value2Body: Great products remove friction and make the next step obvious.
about.value3Body: Small improvements compound into life-changing results.

employerTalentPool.nominateBlockedBodyGeneric: {name} is in the talent pool. Please wait until they complete their improvement path before inviting them to apply.

jobSeekerInvites.title: Job invitations
